release_date_definition: First public developer availability of the named upstream model through an official API or downloadable weights. Public preview or experimental availability counts; private previews and announcements without access do not.

identifier_type_definition.model: A named API model that is not pinned to a dated snapshot.

availability_definition.api: Public access through an official developer API.

sources.title: Introducing APIs for GPT-3.5 Turbo and Whisper
sources.evidence: OpenAI launched the GPT-3.5 Turbo API on March 1, 2023.

sources.title: Function calling and other API updates
sources.evidence: OpenAI identifies the original dated API model as gpt-3.5-turbo-0301.

sources.title: gpt-3.5-turbo-instruct Model
sources.evidence: OpenAI's model documentation confirms the exact legacy Completions model identifier.

sources.title: GPT-3.5 Turbo Instruct
sources.evidence: Vercel's model catalog dates the launch to September 18, 2023.

sources.title: New models and developer products announced at DevDay
sources.evidence: OpenAI launched GPT-4 Turbo in API preview at DevDay on November 6, 2023.

sources.title: Hello GPT-4o
sources.evidence: OpenAI publicly released GPT-4o text and image capabilities on May 13, 2024.

sources.title: GPT-4o Model
sources.evidence: OpenAI's model documentation lists the dated snapshot gpt-4o-2024-05-13.

sources.title: Hello GPT-4o
sources.evidence: OpenAI's GPT-4o launch is dated May 13, 2024.

sources.title: GPT-4o mini: advancing cost-efficient intelligence
sources.evidence: OpenAI made GPT-4o mini available in its APIs on July 18, 2024.

sources.title: Introducing OpenAI o1-preview
sources.evidence: OpenAI released o1-mini in ChatGPT and the API on September 12, 2024.

sources.title: OpenAI o1 and new tools for developers
sources.evidence: OpenAI says it shipped o1-2024-12-17 in the API that day.

sources.title: o1-pro Model
sources.evidence: OpenAI's model documentation lists the original API snapshot as o1-pro-2025-03-19.

sources.title: OpenAI's o1-pro is the company's most expensive AI model yet
sources.evidence: Contemporaneous reporting confirms the o1-pro developer API launch on March 19, 2025.

sources.title: OpenAI o3-mini
sources.evidence: OpenAI's dated release says o3-mini became available in ChatGPT and the API that day.

sources.title: Introducing OpenAI o3 and o4-mini

sources.evidence: OpenAI says GPT-5 nano became available in its API on August 7, 2025.

sources.title: Introducing GPT-5 for developers

sources.evidence: Anthropic's March 4 launch says Claude 3 Opus was available in its API that day.

sources.title: Claude Platform release notes
sources.evidence: Anthropic's June 20, 2024 release-note entry says Claude 3.5 Sonnet became generally available across the Claude API, Bedrock, and Vertex AI.

sources.title: Claude Platform release notes
sources.evidence: Anthropic's June 20, 2024 release-note entry records API general availability for this Claude 3.5 Sonnet release.

sources.title: Model deprecations
sources.evidence: Anthropic's lifecycle documentation identifies the dated API model as claude-3-5-sonnet-20240620.

sources.title: Claude Platform release notes
sources.evidence: Anthropic's November 4, 2024 entry says Claude 3.5 Haiku became available on the Claude API that day.

sources.title: We're expanding our Gemini 2.5 family of models
sources.evidence: Google released Gemini 2.5 Flash-Lite in public API preview on June 17, 2025.
